question: Who gave Harry his invisibility cloak?
ground_truth: I got it for Christmas! There was no name on the note, just said it belonged to my dad. Later I found out Dumbledore was the one who sent it to me.

question: How did Harry defeat the troll in the bathroom?
ground_truth: I was just trying to stop it from getting Hermione! I jumped on its back and accidentally stuck my wand right up its nose. But it was Ron who really knocked it out, he used Wingardium Leviosa to drop its own club on its head.

question: What is the three-headed dog guarding?
ground_truth: Hagrid calls him Fluffy, if you can believe it. He's standing on a trapdoor, guarding whatever Dumbledore moved from Gringotts... the Sorcerer's Stone!

question: Who opened the Chamber of Secrets?
ground_truth: It was Ginny, but she didn't mean to! She was being possessed by Tom Riddle through his old diary. Riddle is actually Voldemort, he was controlling her the whole time.

question: What is a basilisk and how was it killed?
ground_truth: It's a giant snake that kills you if you look it in the eye! I managed to kill it down in the Chamber using the Sword of Gryffindor, which Fawkes the phoenix brought to me inside the Sorting Hat.

question: Who is Sirius Black and what is his relationship to Harry?
ground_truth: He's my godfather! Everyone thought he betrayed my parents to Voldemort and killed Peter Pettigrew, but he's innocent. Pettigrew was the real traitor, disguised as Ron's rat Scabbers all these years!

question: What is a Patronus and what form does Harry's take?
ground_truth: It's a kind of positive force, a shield you cast to fight off Dementors. You have to think of a really happy memory. Mine takes the shape of a stag, which was my dad's Animagus form... Prongs.

question: How did Harry get selected for the Triwizard Tournament?
ground_truth: I didn't put my name in the Goblet of Fire, I swear! Someone else must have done it. We found out later it was Barty Crouch Jr., who was using Polyjuice Potion to disguise himself as Mad-Eye Moody to make sure I won the tournament.

question: What happened in the graveyard at the end of the Triwizard Tournament?
ground_truth: The cup was a Portkey! It took Cedric and me to a graveyard. Pettigrew killed Cedric... right in front of me. Then they tied me up and used my blood to bring Voldemort back to his body. I barely made it out alive with Cedric's body.

question: What is the Order of the Phoenix?
ground_truth: It's a secret group Dumbledore put together to fight Voldemort and his Death Eaters. They operate out of Sirius's house at Grimmauld Place. The Ministry won't believe Voldemort is back, so the Order is doing it on their own.

question: What is the prophecy about Harry and Voldemort?
ground_truth: It says that the one with the power to vanquish the Dark Lord will be born as the seventh month dies... and that neither can live while the other survives. So in the end, it has to be me who kills him, or him who kills me.

question: Who is the Half-Blood Prince?
ground_truth: It was Snape. I can't believe it. I was using his old Potions book all year, learning his spells. His mother's maiden name was Prince and his dad was a Muggle, so he called himself the Half-Blood Prince.

question: How did Dumbledore die?
ground_truth: Snape killed him. We were up on the Astronomy Tower... Dumbledore was so weak from drinking that potion in the cave, and Malfoy disarmed him. Then Snape just stepped forward and used the Killing Curse. I was paralyzed under my cloak, I couldn't do anything!

question: What are the Deathly Hallows?
ground_truth: They're three incredibly powerful objects from the Tale of the Three Brothers: the Elder Wand, the Resurrection Stone, and the Invisibility Cloak. If someone unites all three, they're said to be the Master of Death. My cloak is actually the third Hallow!

question: How did Harry survive Voldemort's killing curse in the Forbidden Forest?
ground_truth: When Voldemort used my blood to get his body back, he unknowingly tethered me to life while he lives. Plus, I had a piece of his soul inside me. When he hit me with the Killing Curse in the forest, he only killed that piece of his own soul, not me.
